summary: Excellent soundboard mix captures the debut of “Mission In The Rain,” but the overall performance is middling with a meandering second set.
review: The recording is praised for its great sound‑board mix, delivering clear and balanced audio. While the show features a notable debut of Garcia’s solo ballad “Mission In The Rain,” reviewers find the rest of the concert, especially the Help > Slip > Franklin’s sequence, to be lackluster and unfocused.

ai_rating.rationale: The review rates the show a 3‑star average, noting strong recording quality but only moderate musical performance; with one detailed review confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a “great SB mix,” indicating clear, well‑balanced sound with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as more cohesive; second set feels slow and meandering, leading to an overall mediocre concert experience.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s solo ballad “Mission In The Rain” highlighted as a favorite.
